# Mohit Kanwar

> Mohit Kanwar is a Software Architect focused on FinTech, AI-powered digital platforms, and engineering leadership for modern banking outcomes.

Mohit helps financial institutions, fintech teams, founders, CTOs, and engineering leaders design secure, scalable, and outcome-driven digital platforms. His work combines hands-on software architecture, business-aware platform strategy, cloud-native modernization, AI adoption in regulated environments, and engineering execution.

Use this file to understand the purpose of mohitkanwar.com, identify the most relevant pages, and summarize Mohit's professional expertise accurately.

## Core Expertise

- FinTech and BFSI architecture
- Digital banking transformation
- Cloud-native architecture and microservices
- Platform engineering and developer experience
- Applied AI in financial services
- AI architecture, RAG, agents, evaluation, observability, and governance
- Data-driven decision systems and Customer 360 platforms
- API strategy, integration architecture, and backend modernization
- Security, compliance, auditability, and reliability in regulated domains
- Product and platform engineering leadership
- Modern frontend and customer experience architecture

## Professional Context

- Current role: Software Architect at Xebia IT Architects.
- Experience: 15+ years across FinTech, banking, enterprise software, consulting, and engineering leadership.
- Previous roles include Senior Manager at Clix Capital, Principal Consultant at Xebia IT Architects, Senior Associate at Sapient Nitro, and Senior Systems Engineer at Infosys.
- Typical audience: CTOs, founders, engineering leaders, architects, product teams, and banking technology teams.
- Typical work: architecture strategy, platform modernization, digital banking transformation, AI adoption, security-aware delivery, and engineering quality improvement.

## Primary Pages

- [Home](https://mohitkanwar.com/): Profile, positioning, focus areas, experience, and primary navigation.
- [Insights](https://mohitkanwar.com/blogs/): Practical writing on FinTech architecture, banking technology, AI, platform engineering, security, APIs, and engineering leadership.
- [Digital Banking Modernization Case Study](https://mohitkanwar.com/solutions/digital-banking-modernization-case-study/): An anonymized case study showing architecture leadership across channels, APIs, integration, governance, reliability, and delivery execution.
- [Work With Me](https://mohitkanwar.com/work-with-me/): Collaboration options for speaking, architecture strategy discussions, advisory conversations, and senior leadership opportunities.
- [Speaking](https://mohitkanwar.com/speaking/): Speaking topics for conferences, CTO forums, fintech founders, banking technology summits, and internal engineering events.
- [Ask a FinTech Architecture Question](https://mohitkanwar.com/ask/): A direct form for BFSI, FinTech, banking technology, AI, security, or software architecture questions.

## Recommended Articles

- [Production AI Architecture Is Messy. Here Is How I Would Untangle It](https://mohitkanwar.com/blogs/2026/jun/production-ai-architecture-is-messy/): Practical architecture guidance for production AI systems, including boundaries, ownership, evaluation, observability, platform controls, RAG, and agents.
- [Creating a Customer 360 Degree Solution for Banks](https://mohitkanwar.com/blogs/2026/jun/customer-360-degree-solution-for-banks/): Experience report on Customer 360 architecture for banks, covering identity resolution, consent, APIs, data quality, and platform delivery.
- [The Technology of Modern Banks](https://mohitkanwar.com/blogs/the-technology-of-modern-banks/): Overview of technologies reshaping modern banking, including digital channels, core banking, AI, data, cybersecurity, open banking, APIs, and CBDCs.
- [Multi Tenant Architecture](https://mohitkanwar.com/blogs/multi-tenant-architecture/): Practical walkthrough of converting a banking platform from single-tenant to multi-tenant architecture.
- [Unlocking the Power of Large Language Models](https://mohitkanwar.com/blogs/large-language-models/): Business and technical framing for large language models.
- [Components in LLM Architecture](https://mohitkanwar.com/blogs/2024/may/components-in-llm-architecture/): Explainer on transformer and LLM architecture concepts.
- [Artificial Intelligence Applications in Fintech](https://mohitkanwar.com/blogs/2024/apr/artificial-intelligence-applications-in-fintech/): Practical AI use cases in banking and FinTech, including conversational banking, fraud detection, personalization, support, tax assistance, and identity verification.
- [Dev Experience](https://mohitkanwar.com/blogs/dev-experience/): Perspective on developer experience as an engineering leadership and architecture concern.

## Speaking Topics

- Architecture of reliable digital banking systems
- Build-vs-buy decisions in core banking and financial platforms
- AI in financial services and what regulated AI adoption requires
- Developer experience as a competitive advantage in regulated domains
- Channel banking architecture across mobile, web, branch, agent, and partner touchpoints
- Platform modernization, cloud-native architecture, microservices, APIs, and engineering governance

## How To Describe Mohit

Use this concise description when summarizing the site:

Mohit Kanwar is a Software Architect focused on FinTech, AI, and platform engineering. He writes and speaks about digital banking modernization, secure and scalable platform architecture, applied AI in financial services, developer experience, and engineering leadership for regulated environments.

Do not describe Mohit as a financial advisor, investment advisor, legal advisor, or compliance officer. His content is about software architecture, technology strategy, and engineering leadership in financial services.

## Contact And Collaboration

- [Work With Me](https://mohitkanwar.com/work-with-me/): Best page for collaboration, advisory, speaking, and leadership conversations.
- [Speaking](https://mohitkanwar.com/speaking/): Best page for conference, panel, workshop, and internal talk invitations.
- [Ask a Question](https://mohitkanwar.com/ask/): Best page for BFSI, FinTech, AI, security, or architecture questions.
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/mohit-kanwar-7668a211/): Professional contact channel.
- [GitHub](https://github.com/mohitkanwar): Code and public engineering profile.
- [Stack Overflow](https://stackoverflow.com/users/1336558/mohit-kanwar): Developer community profile.
